faq.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this question?

fixedTeamStandings.question: How are group standings decided?
fixedTeamStandings.answer:
In the regular season, each group’s table is ordered by match wins (not by points).

If players or teams have the same number of wins:
1. Two tied — their head-to-head result decides
2. Three or more tied — a mini-table of matches only among them, decided by:
   • match wins in the mini-table
   • set difference
   • game difference
3. If two are still level after the mini-table — their head-to-head result

Applies to fixed-team leagues and 1v1 leagues. Playoff matches do not count toward group standings.
